zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Killam於1703年11月19日出生在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德恩費爾德時，她的父親James Killam26歲，母親Patience Mary Collins24歲。她於1725年4月15日與Ebenezer Morris在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Killam于1703年11月19日出生在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德时，她的父亲James Killam26岁，母亲Patience Mary Collins24岁。她于1725年4月15日与Ebenezer Morris在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Killam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire): variant of Kilham, a habitational name from any of the places in Northumberland and Yorkshire, so named either from Old English cylnum ‘(at) the kilns’, dative plural of cyln, or from Old English cyln ‘kiln’ or the personal name Cylla + Old Norse holmr ‘small island, water meadow’. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: British Forces Capture Fort Griswold
historicEvents.description: The capture of Fort Griswold was the final act of treason that Benedict Arnold committed. This would be a British victory. On the American side 85 were killed, 35 wounded and paroled, 28 taken prisoner, 13 escaped, and 1 twelve year old was captured and released.
historicEvents.urlTitle: History of the Battle of Groton and The Burning of New London

historicEvents.title: Creating the Eleventh Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Eleventh Amendment restricts the ability of any people to start a lawsuit against the states in federal court.

historicEvents.title: Brass is Discovered
historicEvents.description: "In 1802, brass was identified in Waterbury, Connecticut. This gave the city the nickname ""The Brass City."" Brass dominated the city and helped to create the city. The motto of the city is Quid Aere Perennius, which means What is more lasting than brass? in Latin."
historicEvents.urlTitle: Connecticut History.Org- Birth of the Brass Valley

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Killam was born on 19 November 1703, in Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States, her father, James Killam, was 26 and her mother, Patience Mary Collins, was 24. She married Ebenezer Morris on 15 April 1725, in Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Killam est née le 19 novembre 1703, à Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis, son père, James Killam, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Patience Mary Collins, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Ebenezer Morris le 15 avril 1725, à Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Killam am 19. November 1703 in Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Killam 26 und ihre Mutter Patience Mary Collins 24. ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Killamが1703年11月19日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードエンフィールドで生まれた時，父James Killamは26歳，母Patience Mary Collinsは24歳であった。1725年4月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードエンフィールドでEbenezer Morrisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Killam(이)가 1703년 11월 19일 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Killam(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Patience Mary Collins(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1725년 4월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 필드에서 Ebenezer Morris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Killam родилась 19 ноября 1703 г. в местности энфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени James Killam было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Patience Mary Collins, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ebenezer Morris 15 апреля 1725 г. в местности энфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери.
